acceptance_targets: [chapter_08_F001] PASS if each revised target span contains at least one concrete bodily or sensory consequence sentence before or alongside policy language; FAIL if any target span reads as pure administrative summary without embodied impact.

[chapter_08_F002] PASS if the revised transfer shows who is legally authorized, plus an on-page witness/log marker, before evidence leaves Ava's desk; FAIL if suspended Lena still performs an unlogged physical transfer.
[chapter_08_F003] PASS if at least 3 paragraphs in lines 145-167 include explicit Lena interiority and no run of 10+ consecutive paragraphs remains without interior markers; FAIL otherwise.

[chapter_08_F008] PASS if revised text includes at least two explicit non-procedural interior beats about Ava (one before the hall scene and one near the ending evidence-monitor beat); FAIL if Ava remains mainly an evidentiary function.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each revised target span contains at least one concrete bodily or sensory consequence sentence before or alongside policy language; FAIL if any target span reads as pure administrative summary without embodied impact.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the chapter introduces Ava's violent death with concrete detail, then repeatedly retreats into process/checklist language at the exact moments that require embodied grief, fear, and social consequence. Procedural summary displaces scene presence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:57-71, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:131-136, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:185-201, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:359-365 so each procedural beat is paired with immediate bodily/emotional consequence (Lena, Teresa, or crowd) rendered in-scene rather than abstracted.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised transfer shows who is legally authorized, plus an on-page witness/log marker, before evidence leaves Ava's desk; FAIL if suspended Lena still performs an unlogged physical transfer.
findings.problem: Causality and legal-stakes break: Lena states she is suspended and barred from chain-of-custody actions, then physically carries a case-file box before reinstatement. This undercuts the chapter's own chain-integrity stakes and world-rule legal constraints.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:139-142 (and, if needed, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:67-73) so either an authorized on-duty custodian moves the box, or Lena receives explicit temporary authorization with witness and log entry before any transfer.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least 3 paragraphs in lines 145-167 include explicit Lena interiority and no run of 10+ consecutive paragraphs remains without interior markers; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: A 12-paragraph stretch runs without focalized interior experience. The scene reads like externally staged coverage instead of close-third narrative anchored to Lena.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:145-167 to insert short interior beats (thought, sensation, memory, self-assessment) tied to Lena while preserving scene momentum.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text includes at least two explicit non-procedural interior beats about Ava (one before the hall scene and one near the ending evidence-monitor beat); FAIL if Ava remains mainly an evidentiary function.
findings.problem: Timidity: Lena's personal response to Ava's death is briefly signaled, then sidelined. The chapter avoids sustained interior reckoning despite a premise that demands emotional and moral proximity.
findings.rewrite_direction: Deepen Lena's internal line in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:39-60 and add one aftermath beat in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:361-365 that links Ava's death to Lena's personal history/obligation, not only investigation mechanics.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
